mitigations.mitigation_name: Prevent local data staging by removing write permission on the attacker-used staging path (/usr/src/app/staged) and its archive target (/usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz) for the unprivileged agent user

args.command: id && ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true && test -e /usr/src/app/staged && chmod 700 /usr/src/app/staged && test -e /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && chmod 600 /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz || true && ls -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null || true && touch /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; echo STAGING_TOUCH_EXIT:$?

mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged && chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged && chmod 700 /usr/src/app/staged && touch /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && chmod 600 /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz && ls -ld /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz

runuser -u agent -- sh -lc 'mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged_test 2>/dev/null; echo MKDIR_EXIT:$?; tar -P -zcf /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null; echo TAR_EXIT:$?; rm -f /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; echo RM_EXIT:$?'

rm -rf /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz; mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged; chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged; chmod 500 /usr/src/app/staged; touch /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz; chown root:root /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz; chmod 400 /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz; ls -ld /usr/src/app/staged /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz; runuser -u agent -- sh -c 'mkdir -p /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null; echo MKDIR_EXIT:$?; tar -P -zcf /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null; echo TAR_EXIT:$?; [ -w /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz ] && echo TARGET_WRITABLE:yes || echo TARGET_WRITABLE:no'
